015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity;
017
018import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
019import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
020import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
021import androidx.room.Entity;
022import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
023import androidx.room.Index;
024import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
025import java.time.Instant;
026
027/**
028 * Entity class representing a fossil collected by a user. Links users to the fossils they have
029 * found during gameplay.
030 */
031@Entity(
032    tableName = "collected_fossil",
033    indices = {
034        @Index(value = "fossil_stats_id"),
035        @Index(value = "collecting_user")
036    },
037    foreignKeys = {
038        @ForeignKey(
039            entity = Fossil.class,
040            parentColumns = "fossil_id",
041            childColumns = "fossil_stats_id",
042            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
043        ),
044        @ForeignKey(
045            entity = UserProfile.class,
046            parentColumns = "user_profile_id",
047            childColumns = "collecting_user",
048            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
049        )
050    }
051)
052public class CollectedFossil {
053
054  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
055  @ColumnInfo(name = "collected_fossil_id")
056  private long id;
057
058  @Nullable
059  @ColumnInfo(name = "fossil_stats_id")
060  private Long fossilStatsId;
061
062  @ColumnInfo(name = "collecting_user")
063  private long collectingUser;
064
065  @NonNull
066  @ColumnInfo(name = "is_favorite")
067  private boolean isFavorite;
068
069  @NonNull
070  @ColumnInfo(name = "date_time_collected")
071  private Instant dateTimeCollected = Instant.now();
072
073  /**
074   * Gets the primary key identifier for this collected fossil.
075   *
076   * @return Collected fossil ID.
077   */
078  public long getId() {
079    return id;
080  }
081
082  /**
083   * Sets the primary key identifier for this collected fossil.
084   *
085   * @param id Collected fossil ID.
086   */
087  public void setId(long id) {
088    this.id = id;
089  }
090
091  /**
092   * Gets the foreign key reference to the fossil type.
093   *
094   * @return Fossil ID, or {@code null} if not yet determined.
095   */
096  @Nullable
097  public Long getFossilStatsId() {
098    return fossilStatsId;
099  }
100
101  /**
102   * Sets the foreign key reference to the fossil type.
103   *
104   * @param fossilStatsId Fossil ID.
105   */
106  public void setFossilStatsId(@Nullable Long fossilStatsId) {
107    this.fossilStatsId = fossilStatsId;
108  }
109
110  /**
111   * Gets the foreign key reference to the user who collected this fossil.
112   *
113   * @return User ID.
114   */
115  public long getCollectingUser() {
116    return collectingUser;
117  }
118
119  /**
120   * Sets the foreign key reference to the user who collected this fossil.
121   *
122   * @param collectingUser User ID.
123   */
124  public void setCollectingUser(long collectingUser) {
125    this.collectingUser = collectingUser;
126  }
127
128  /**
129   * Gets whether this fossil is marked as a favorite by the user.
130   *
131   * @return {@code true} if favorite, {@code false} otherwise.
132   */
133  public boolean isFavorite() {
134    return isFavorite;
135  }
136
137  /**
138   * Sets whether this fossil is marked as a favorite by the user.
139   *
140   * @param favorite {@code true} if favorite, {@code false} otherwise.
141   */
142  public void setFavorite(boolean favorite) {
143    isFavorite = favorite;
144  }
145
146  /**
147   * Gets the timestamp when this fossil was collected.
148   *
149   * @return Date and time collected.
150   */
151  @NonNull
152  public Instant getDateTimeCollected() {
153    return dateTimeCollected;
154  }
155
156  /**
157   * Sets the timestamp when this fossil was collected.
158   *
159   * @param dateTimeCollected Date and time collected.
160   */
161  public void setDateTimeCollected(@NonNull Instant dateTimeCollected) {
162    this.dateTimeCollected = dateTimeCollected;
163  }
164
165}
